title: Cephalomanes setigerum
taxonomy: Cephalomanes setigerum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. The Hymenophyllaceae family is a group of small to medium-sized epiphytic or terrestrial ferns commonly known as filmy ferns. They are characterized by their delicate, thin leaves and are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Cephalomanes setigerum is native to parts of Southeast Asia. This species, like others in the Hymenophyllaceae family, plays an important role in the ecosystem as a food source and habitat for various insects and small animals.
